title: GPIO Pin Explorer
description: Students will explain the difference between a digital input pin and a digital output pin, and correctly map HIGH/LOW states to voltage levels and MicroPython boolean values.
creator: Dan McCreary STEM Robots
subject: Robotics
Physical Computing
Computational Thinking
MicroPython
bloomLevel: Understand (L2) — Explain how GPIO pins switch between input and output modes and how HIGH/LOW states map to voltage.

learningObjectives: Students will explain the difference between a digital input pin and a digital output pin, and correctly map HIGH/LOW states to voltage levels and MicroPython boolean values.
educational.bloomTaxonomy: Understand (L2) — Explain how GPIO pins switch between input and output modes and how HIGH/LOW states map to voltage.
educational.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the robot platform and MicroPython introduced earlier in the course.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Interactive p5.js exploration with immediate visual feedback
pedagogical.rationale: Manipulating the model and seeing the result immediately helps students build an accurate mental model before working with the physical robot.
pedagogical.assessment: Use the discussion questions in the lesson plan to check for understanding.
